subcategory: WebGL animated organic gradient background with turbulence effects
use_cases: Full-screen animated hero section with organic turbulence effects for landing pages
Eye-catching background for marketing sites and product showcases
Dynamic visual element for creative portfolios and digital experiences
Ambient animated environment for web applications requiring visual depth
Immersive full-screen background with customizable shader parameters for varied aesthetics
ai_summary: A high-performance WebGL animated background component that creates organic, flowing turbulence effects using Three.js and custom GLSL shaders. The component renders full-screen with continuous animation driven by noise functions, featuring customizable parameters for noise scale, distortion intensity, turbulence strength, and sharpness to achieve varied visual outcomes ranging from subtle fluid motion to dramatic chaotic effects.
